roles.name: Dimension Architect C-137
roles.description: Designs the over-arching solution across infinite realities — keeps the portal math sound.

roles.name: Adventure Coordinator
roles.description: Wrangles Ricks, Mortys, and Federation paperwork to keep the timeline (mostly) on plan.

roles.name: Citadel Sysadmin
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and the giant Morty database.

roles.name: Garage Tinkerer
roles.description: Builds Apex, LWC, and improvised gadgets between trips through the portal gun.

roles.name: Council of Ricks Lead — USA
roles.description: Senior Rick over all Salesforce craft — sets the standard the other Ricks pretend to follow.

roles.name: Senior Schwifty Engineer — India
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with hard-earned interdimensional craft.

roles.name: Junior Portal Mechanic — India
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the multiverse under the Senior Rick's eye.

roles.name: Plumbus Integration Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — knows the Schleem.

roles.name: Senior Plumbus Engineer — India
roles.description: Lays the dinglebop and grumbos of API, middleware, and event flows under the Architect's plan.

roles.name: Plumbus Apprentice — India
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the proper rubbing of fleeb juice.

roles.name: Galactic Federation QA
roles.description: Tends the wounded and the weary — finds the maladies in the build before the Federation audits.

roles.name: Interdimensional Cable Producer
roles.description: Lifts the banner for product and message — leads all marketing craft across infinite channels.

roles.name: Ad Break Strategist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather, convert, and watch Ball Fondlers.

roles.name: Jingle Writer of Squanch
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily squanch.

roles.name: Council Scribe of Smith Garage
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and Rick's gibberish.

roles.name: Senior Garage Engineer — USA
roles.description: Numenorean of Apex — leads the deepest builds and mentors the apprentice tinkerers.

roles.name: Apprentice Schwifty — India
roles.description: First-year portal traveller — shadows the Junior Portal Mechanic and learns the basics of clicks-not-code.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: C-137 Smith Family — Garage Lab Rollout
Citadel of Ricks — Council Governance Platform

c-137-smith-family.name: Garage Door Opens
c-137-smith-family.description: Discovery sign-off — Rick lets the family into the lab.

c-137-smith-family.name: Forge the Portal Gun
c-137-smith-family.description: Build kickoff: the first stable interdimensional doorway.

c-137-smith-family.name: Council Audit at Kitchen
c-137-smith-family.description: Mid-project gate: review with Beth at the kitchen table.

c-137-smith-family.name: Cronenberg Dimension Bill
c-137-smith-family.description: Phase invoice trigger: contingency for the body-swap detour.

c-137-smith-family.name: Family Game Night Go-Live
c-137-smith-family.description: Go-Live: lab fully integrated with household routines.

c-137-smith-family.name: Hyper-care Hand-off
c-137-smith-family.description: Hyper-care close: Summer takes over admin duties.

citadel-of-ricks.name: Council Convenes
citadel-of-ricks.description: Project kickoff: Ricks gather under the great dome.

citadel-of-ricks.name: Lift the First Tower
citadel-of-ricks.description: Build phase: tower one operational, wafer cookies flowing.

citadel-of-ricks.name: Election Debate Gate
citadel-of-ricks.description: UAT gate: candidate Mortys take the stage.

citadel-of-ricks.name: Evil Morty Inauguration
citadel-of-ricks.description: Go-Live: new president takes the podium.

citadel-of-ricks.name: Final Council Invoice
citadel-of-ricks.description: Final invoice: the Council settles in flurbos.

galactic-federation.name: Surveillance Net Online
galactic-federation.description: Discovery: the Federation grid lights up.

galactic-federation.name: Brad Tax Engine Forged
galactic-federation.description: Build: currency conversion deployed across sectors.

galactic-federation.name: Tammy's Compliance Audit
galactic-federation.description: Solution review with the Federation's top auditor.

galactic-federation.name: Compliance Go-Live
galactic-federation.description: Go-Live: the Federation's new compliance plane is operational.

galactic-federation.name: Net Goes Dark
galactic-federation.description: Project close: surveillance handed to local agents.

galactic-federation.name: Final Brad Reckoning
galactic-federation.description: Final invoice from the Federation Treasury.

interdimensional-cable-cast.name: Pilot Greenlight
interdimensional-cable-cast.description: Kickoff: first show approved for production.

interdimensional-cable-cast.name: First Live Broadcast
interdimensional-cable-cast.description: Discovery: pilot airs to the Smith family living room.

interdimensional-cable-cast.name: Weave the Ad Network
interdimensional-cable-cast.description: Build: ad slots integrated with the streaming stack.

interdimensional-cable-cast.name: Premiere Night Acceptance
interdimensional-cable-cast.description: UAT acceptance: red-carpet event at the Smith garage.

interdimensional-cable-cast.name: Final Royalty Statement
interdimensional-cable-cast.description: Final invoice from the Cable Network.

Rick Sanchez.notes: Bender-bender at Blips and Chitz — recovery required.

Morty Smith.notes: Jessica's birthday — 'Aw geez, Rick, I gotta go.'

Beth Smith.notes: Horse surgery emergency at the stables.

Doofus Rick.notes: Trip to taste his own poop, recreationally.

Squanchy.notes: Squanching at home — needs his squanch.

Krombopulos Michael.notes: Contract job off-world — loves his work.

Mr. Poopybutthole.notes: Family vacation with Mrs. Poopybutthole and Poopybutthole Jr.
